description: Role-skill mappings for Project Manager, Technical Project Manager, and Program Manager. These roles sit in the Operations family within Post-sale / CS / Operations sector. Heavy reuse of existing cross-sector skills with 2 new skills (program_management, technical_project_delivery) to capture what is genuinely distinct about these roles.

role_skill_mappings.title: Project Manager
role_skill_mappings.notes: Customer-facing delivery PM in matrix environment. Based on Playtech, Nayax, Nebius mid-level, and Cymbio listings. Core is execution: timelines, risks, stakeholders, delivery. Israeli market emphasis on customer-facing capability and matrix management.

role_skill_mappings.title: Technical Project Manager
role_skill_mappings.notes: Bridges business and engineering. Based on Elbit C4I, AnyRM, Cymbio, and Imperva/Thales listings. Requires understanding of software development, APIs, system architecture. Translates business needs into technical plans. More technical depth than general PM.

role_skill_mappings.title: Program Manager
role_skill_mappings.notes: Coordinates multiple projects toward strategic outcomes. Based on PayPal, Elbit defense, Gilat, XTEND, Israel Shipyards listings. Manages program P&L, budgets, resources. Executive-level reporting. Matrix leadership across multiple delivery teams. Israeli defense and enterprise tech both have strong PgM demand.
